name: BlazEr1 X-ray-anchored TeV-favourable population branch: reproducibility and external-cohort transfer package
description: Frozen reproducibility release for the BlazEr1 X-ray-anchored TeV-favourable population analysis and a non-overlapping 4LAC-DR3 external-cohort transfer audit. The release contains catalogue snapshots, source code, machine-readable catalogues, statistical products, vector figures, provenance records, and automated validation gates.
